## Prerequisites

- Partner API credentials (client ID + secret)
- Static IPs whitelisted in partner firewall
- Webhook URL configured in partner dashboard

## Authentication

### OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials

```
POST /oauth/token
Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded

grant_type=client_credentials&client_id=CLIENT_ID&client_secret=CLIENT_SECRET
```

Response:

```json
{ "access_token": "...", "expires_in": 3600 }
```

## Webhook Payload

```json
{
  "event": "order.fulfilled",
  "timestamp": "2026-06-18T12:00:00Z",
  "data": {
    "order_id": "459164",
    "status": "shipped",
    "tracking_number": "117171"
  }
}
```

## Retry Policy

- Exponential backoff: 1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, 16s, 32s (max 6 attempts)
- Jitter: +/-20% random
- Max total time: 5 minutes before dead-letter
